form.formComment: Third-up today. Not raced for 52 days. First-up 3rd of 8 at Taruma on February 8 over 1400m, 13 len behind Parson carrying 54kg at $7.10. Second run from a spell 7th of 10 at Taruma on February 21 over 1300m, in the wet; 6 len behind Sonic Do Iguassu carrying 54kg at $7.50. This race is well within her grasp.

form.formComment: First-up. Finished off last campaign when last of 9 at this track February 1 over 1300m, 22 len behind Speak Alpha with 51kg at $27.20. Previously first up; ran last of 9 at this track September 29 over 1000m, 11 len behind Stylistic with 55kg at $13.10. May need this run.

form.formComment: At the latest run 8th of 11 at this track on March 29 over 1000m, 7 len behind Sky Do Iguassu carrying 57kg at $30.40. The start before that 3rd in a small field at Cristal on February 5 over 1100m, 3.5 len behind Xavier carrying 55kg at $7. Worth another chance.
